price: ICTAAL print ~37 EUR (ISBN 9782371800908 / doc-ed. 9782371805088); ARP 2022 sold via Cerema boutique (ISBN 9782371805644)
notes: Both CURRENT full guides are PAID/gated, no free official full PDF found. (1) ICTAAL 'version actualisee mai 2015' full text = DTRF DT6907 (Dtrf-0006907, 60 pp.) but DTRF login-gated (extrait-pdf viewer demands account); doc.cerema.fr notice 14161 = 'Acces libre' catalogue notice only, its digital-viewer (c-14161) returns 'Indisponible/authentification' = paid boutique edition. English translation = SYRACUSE 594138 (ISBN 9782371805910), also no free document object. (2) ARP = 2022 Cerema guide, SYRACUSE 592036 (ISBN 9782371805644), digital-viewer c-592036 also 'Indisponible/authentification' = paid boutique. The Legifrance/Bulletin-Officiel instruction du 13 juillet 2015 (legifrance circulaire id 39841; BO met_20150014_0000_0018) is only a ~16 KB cover circular, NOT the technical guide. THE FILE SAVED is the only freely-downloadable OFFICIAL ICTAAL artifact: 'Mise a jour 2021 du guide ICTAAL de mai 2015' (Cerema, DTRF DT9033, Dtrf-0008466, 4 pp.) = a corrigendum/update sheet, NOT the full standard. Older free precursors on DTRF (open): ICTAAL 2000 circular DT2540, and the legacy 1994 SETRA ARP exists but was not isolated by an exact title-field hit (DTRF full-text search returns 4750 noisy hits). Mirrors found (pdfcoffee, calameo, scribd-like, livrosdeamor) NOT used per rules. See TO_BUY.md.
